name: pnpm-upgrade
description: Keep pnpm current: run pnpm self-update/corepack prepare, align packageManager in package.json, and bump pnpm/action-setup + pinned pnpm versions in .github/workflows to the latest release.
intent_triggers: use the pnpm upgrade agent skill
run a workflow for pnpm upgrade
我需要處理 pnpm upgrade 相關工作
幫我啟用 pnpm upgrade 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 pnpm upgrade
